input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for Escrow.
input_context.outcome_question: Recommend the XRP-native YES/NO vote/outcome for this named decision surface from pre-outcome facts only.

source_facts.claim: Escrow: Replaces the SusPay and CryptoConditions amendments. Provides "suspended payments" for XRP for escrow within the XRP Ledger, including support for Interledger Protocol Crypto-Conditions. Creates a new ledger object type for suspended payments and new transaction types to create, execute, and cancel suspended payments.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
Escrow appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 0.60.0.
